intro x y
    have h‚āĀ : Pr[=x | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> ($ŠĶó őĪ) <*> ($ŠĶó ő≤)] = Pr[=y | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> ($ŠĶó őĪ) <*> ($ŠĶó ő≤)] := by
      calc
        Pr[=x | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> ($ŠĶó őĪ) <*> ($ŠĶó ő≤)] = (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ := by
          -- Use the fact that the product of uniform distributions is uniform and the probabilities are the same
          calc
            Pr[ = x | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> ($ŠĶó őĪ) <*> ($ŠĶó ő≤)] = (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ := by
              -- Use the properties of the product distribution
              simp [probOutput_product_distrib, probOutput_uniformSample]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> field_simp [ENNReal.mul_inv, ENNReal.inv_mul]
            _ = (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ := by rfl
        _ = (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ := by rfl
        _ = Pr[=y | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> ($ŠĶó őĪ) <*> ($ŠĶó ő≤)] := by
          -- Similarly, for y, the probability is the same
          calc
            (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ = (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ := by rfl
            _ = Pr[ = y | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> ($ŠĶó őĪ) <*> ($ŠĶó ő≤)] := by
              -- Use the properties of the product distribution
              simp [probOutput_product_distrib, probOutput_uniformSample]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> field_simp [ENNReal.mul_inv, ENNReal.inv_mul]
    exact h‚āĀ

      have h‚āÉ : Pr[=y | (fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> $ŠĶó őĪ <*> $ŠĶó ő≤] = (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) / (Fintype.card őĪ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) / (Fintype.card ő≤ : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) := by
        simp [SPMF.bind_map, SPMF.map_map, probOutput_seq_map_prod_mk_eq_mul, probOutput_uniformSample, mul_comm]
        <;> field_simp [Fintype.card_pos_iff] <;> norm_cast <;> simp [Fintype.card_pos_iff]
        <;>
          (try aesop)
        <;>
          (try simp_all [Fintype.card_pos_iff])
      rw [h‚āā, h‚āÉ]
    exact h‚āĀ
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [SPMF.bind_map, SPMF.map_map, probFailure_seq]
    <;>
      (try simp_all [SampleableType.probFailure_selectElem])
    <;>
      (try
        {
          field_simp [Fintype.card_pos_iff]
          <;>
            norm_cast
          <;>
            simp_all [Fintype.card_pos_iff]
          <;>
            aesop
        })
